channel.title: Cover & Protect Insurance Guides
channel.description: Insurance and savings guides for Ontario families, newcomers, self-employed professionals, and small businesses.

item.title: Travel Insurance 2026 for Canadians: Costs, Coverage and How to Choose
item.description: An updated guide to emergency medical coverage, 2026 planning costs, single-trip versus annual plans, long-stay insurance and pre-existing condition rules for Canadians abroad.

item.title: RRSP vs. TFSA: Which Should You Use First?
item.description: A plain-language Ontario guide to comparing RRSP and TFSA accounts, including tax timing, flexibility, and common use cases.

item.title: RESP and CESG Explained for Ontario Families
item.description: An educational guide to Registered Education Savings Plans and the Canada Education Savings Grant.

item.title: Health and Dental Insurance for the Self-Employed
item.description: How self-employed people in Ontario can compare individual health and dental insurance options.

item.title: Is Critical Illness Insurance Worth It?
item.description: A practical guide to how critical illness insurance works, what it covers, and factors to consider.

item.title: Term vs. Whole Life Insurance in Canada
item.description: A comparison of term and permanent life insurance, including cost structure, duration, and common objectives.

item.title: How Much Life Insurance Do I Need?
item.description: A framework for estimating life insurance needs using income replacement, debts, education, and existing assets.

item.title: Is Super Visa Insurance Refundable?
item.description: An overview of common Super Visa insurance refund scenarios and the importance of insurer-specific policy terms.

item.title: Does OHIP Cover Visitors to Canada?
item.description: A guide to provincial health coverage gaps for visitors and why emergency medical insurance may be needed.

item.title: How Much Does Super Visa Insurance Cost in 2026?
item.description: Factors that affect Super Visa insurance premiums, including age, deductible, medical history, and coverage design.
